description_long: This is a metallic ring featuring a series of prominent, triangular-cut purple gemstones set evenly around its circumference. The band itself is smooth and polished, with a silvery-gray finish that contrasts elegantly with the deep purple stones. Each gemstone is held securely in place by prongs that rise slightly above the surface of the band, giving the ring a textured and dimensional appearance. The gemstones are spaced at regular intervals, creating a geometric and symmetrical pattern. The overall design is bold yet refined, with a modern aesthetic that emphasizes clean lines and striking color contrast. The ring appears solid and substantial, suitable for everyday wear or as a statement accessory.
description: A polished silver ring set with evenly spaced, triangular purple gemstones in a geometric pattern. The design is modern and bold, with a smooth metallic band and prominent prong-set stones.
description_view_0: The ring is seen from the side, showing the circular band and the raised profile of the gemstones along the top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the band’s width and the triangular shape of the purple gemstones, with prongs visible holding each stone.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view shows the opposite arc of the ring, with the gemstones’ settings visible along the upper edge.
description_view_3: A direct side view focusing on the alignment and spacing of the triangular gemstones along the band.
